# `SetBank`

**Systems:** C64, MEGA65, C128  
**Parameters:** `b`

***

<div markdown="0" class="trse-help-body">

<p>Sets the current VIC bank.
Each vic bank is divided into 16k ($4000) bytes of memory
<code>
 SetBank(VIC_BANK0); // VIC sees data from 0-$3FFF
 SetBank(VIC_BANK1); // VIC sees data from $4000-$7FFF
 ...
 SetBank(VIC_BANK2); // VIC sees data from $8000-$BFFF
 </code>


</div>
